case_title: LLOYD PAMELA J VS MORGAN KAY GUARDIAN AT LITEM FOR MORGAN CINDY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN KAY GUARDIAN AT LITEM FOR MORGAN CINDY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LLOYD PAMELA J AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN KAY GUARDIAN AT LITEM FOR MORGAN CINDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LLOYD PAMELA J IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORGAN KAY GUARDIAN AT LITEM FOR MORGAN CINDY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
